User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /*?*
Allow: /*.html$

# Specific rules for search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

# Crawl delay for resource management
Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://web3currency.com/sitemap.xml
